Container.Name: magguu-bot

Branch.TagDescription: Stable build from main (auto-published via GitHub Actions)

Container.Overview: Discord bot for the download side of a media homelab (Sonarr / Radarr / Seerr / Tautulli / SABnzbd). Receives webhooks and posts styled embeds into categorized Discord channels. Slash commands: /queue (live Sonarr+Radarr+SABnzbd queue), /search, /setup-server (scaffolds categories, channels, roles). Seerr approve/decline buttons built in. Runs as a single container; stores an append-only SQLite activity log in /app/data.

Config.Name: WebUI Port
Config.Description: HTTP port that receives webhooks from *arr services. Only expose to LAN. Containers on the same Docker network reach it via http://magguu-bot:3000 without any port mapping.

Config.Name: AppData
Config.Description: SQLite database + WAL files. Persists across container rebuilds.

Config.Name: DISCORD_TOKEN
Config.Description: Bot token from Discord Developer Portal (Applications -> your app -> Bot -> Reset Token). Treat as a password.

Config.Name: DISCORD_CLIENT_ID
Config.Description: Application ID from Discord Developer Portal (Applications -> your app -> General).

Config.Name: DISCORD_GUILD_ID
Config.Description: Your Discord server ID. Enable Developer Mode in Discord, right-click the server icon, Copy Server ID.

Config.Name: WEBHOOK_SECRET
Config.Description: Shared secret required in X-Magguu-Token header on every webhook. Generate with: openssl rand -hex 32 (minimum 16 chars).

Config.Name: DISCORD_CHANNEL_GRABS
Config.Description: Channel ID for Sonarr/Radarr grab events. Leave empty on first boot, run /setup-server, then fill in from Discord (right-click channel -> Copy Channel ID).

Config.Name: DISCORD_CHANNEL_IMPORTS
Config.Description: Channel ID for completed imports (Sonarr/Radarr Download events + SABnzbd complete).

Config.Name: DISCORD_CHANNEL_FAILURES
Config.Description: Channel ID for ManualInteractionRequired / DownloadFailure / SABnzbd failed events.

Config.Name: DISCORD_CHANNEL_REQUESTS
Config.Description: Channel ID for approved/declined Seerr request notifications.

Config.Name: DISCORD_CHANNEL_APPROVALS
Config.Description: Channel ID for pending Seerr requests with Approve/Decline buttons. Admin-only channel recommended.

Config.Name: DISCORD_CHANNEL_NEW_ON_PLEX
Config.Description: Channel ID for Tautulli recently-added notifications.

Config.Name: DISCORD_CHANNEL_HEALTH
Config.Description: Channel ID for health warnings/errors from Sonarr/Radarr/SABnzbd.

Config.Name: DISCORD_CHANNEL_WELCOME
Config.Description: Channel ID where the bot greets new members with a rich welcome embed + @mention.

Config.Name: DISCORD_CHANNEL_AUDIT_LOG
Config.Description: Channel ID for server-wide audit events (joins, leaves, role changes). Read-only recommended.

Config.Name: DISCORD_CHANNEL_MOD_LOG
Config.Description: Channel ID for moderation actions (warn/timeout/kick/ban/purge). Admin-only channel recommended.

Config.Name: DISCORD_CHANNEL_GITHUB
Config.Description: Channel ID for the GitHub webhook feed (pushes, workflow runs, releases, pull requests).

Config.Name: GITHUB_WEBHOOK_SECRET
Config.Description: HMAC shared secret configured in every GitHub repo's Settings -> Webhooks -> Secret. Generate: openssl rand -hex 32. Leave empty to disable /webhook/github.

Config.Name: SONARR_URL
Config.Description: Sonarr base URL. Use http://sonarr:8989 if Sonarr is on the same Docker network, otherwise http://UNRAID-IP:8989

Config.Name: SONARR_API_KEY
Config.Description: Sonarr API key from Settings -> General. Required for /queue and /search show.

Config.Name: RADARR_URL
Config.Description: Radarr base URL.

Config.Name: RADARR_API_KEY
Config.Description: Radarr API key from Settings -> General.

Config.Name: SEERR_URL
Config.Description: Jellyseerr/Overseerr base URL. Required for Seerr approve/decline buttons.

Config.Name: SEERR_API_KEY
Config.Description: Seerr API key from Settings -> General.

Config.Name: SAB_URL
Config.Description: SABnzbd base URL. Used by /queue to fetch the live slot list.

Config.Name: SAB_API_KEY
Config.Description: SABnzbd API key from Config -> General -> Security.

Config.Name: LOG_LEVEL
Config.Description: Log level: trace | debug | info | warn | error | fatal

Config.Name: NODE_ENV
Config.Description: Keep as 'production' on Unraid.

Config.Name: HTTP_HOST
Config.Description: Interface to bind the webhook server to.

Config.Name: HTTP_PORT
Config.Description: Internal port of the webhook server (must match the port mapping above).

Config.Name: DATABASE_PATH
Config.Description: SQLite database path inside the container (maps through AppData).
